sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
After LEFT:
- ID=3: B 53 (was B 52) - black bar on right edge, 53 pixels (increased by 1)
- ID=12: Y 11 (was Y 12) - yellow face, 11 pixels (decreased by 1)
So LEFT also transfers 1 pixel from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge.
Let me try RIGHT also transfers 1 pixel from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge.
So all actions (UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT, SPACE) transfer 1 pixel from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge.
The goal might be to transfer pixels from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge.
The goal might be to make the black bar on the right edge (ID=3) match the bottom bar (ID=13). The bottom bar has 63 pixels. The black bar on the right edge has 53 pixels. The yellow face (ID=12) has 11 pixels.
So I need to transfer 10 more pixels from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge. So I need to press SPACE 10 times.
But wait, the yellow face has 11 pixels. So I can transfer at most 11 pixels. If I transfer 10 pixels, the black bar on the right edge will have 63 pixels, matching the bottom bar. The yellow face will have 1 pixel left.
Let me try pressing SPACE 10 times.
